metadata.description: A personal collection of Agent Skills for Claude Code, Claude.ai, the Claude API, and other Agent-Skills-compatible tools. Newton has moved to PBNZ/newton-skill; this marketplace currently hosts only the frozen v0.1.0 copy.

plugins.name: newton
plugins.description: [DEPRECATED — moved to PBNZ/newton-skill] Frozen v0.1.0 snapshot of Newton, the reasoning and sparring partner skill. Install from PBNZ/newton-skill for ongoing updates.
